dslRule:
<!id: add.deprecated.to.method.of.deprecated.type>
<!description: Add @Deprecated to a method if its enclosing class is deprecated but the method is not. This aligns with the COMPILER_PB_MEMBER_OF_DEPRECATED_TYPE warning.
>
<!severity: WARNING>

$retType $methodName($params$) :: containsAnnotation("java.lang.Deprecated") && !isDeprecated($methodName) && !isInConstructor()
=> @java.lang.Deprecated $retType $methodName($params$)
;;

verification.message: Candidate DSL must contain only one rule and optional per-rule metadata; file metadata, includes, and embedded Java are not promotable
